name: giant rat
short_desc: A dog-sized rat, yellow teeth bared, dragging a mangy tail.

name: skeleton
short_desc: A clattering thing of yellowed bone and armor-scrap, eye sockets dark.

name: wolf

attacks.name: bite
attacks.effect: on hit, DC 11 STR save or prone

short_desc: A lean grey wolf, hackles up, circling just inside the firelight.

name: giant frog

attacks.name: swallow
attacks.effect: grappled + restrained

short_desc: A toad the size of a small dog, mottled green and grey.

name: stirge

attacks.name: blood drain
attacks.effect: on hit, attaches; drains 1d4+3 HP at start of its turns until detached

short_desc: A fat-bodied bat with a needle proboscis, humming toward warmth.

name: zombie
short_desc: A grey-skinned corpse lurching on one bad leg, jaw working wetly.

name: kobold swarm

attacks.name: rusted daggers
attacks.effect: 1d6 at half HP or fewer

short_desc: A chittering tide of scaled little bodies pouring out of every crack at once.

name: ghoul

attacks.name: claws
attacks.effect: on hit, DC 10 CON save or paralyzed 1 min (save ends)

short_desc: A naked grey cannibal with finger-bones too long, breath sweet with rot.

name: wight

attacks.name: life drain
attacks.effect: on hit, DC 13 CON save or max HP reduced by damage taken (until long rest)

short_desc: A barrow-king in corroded mail, eyes like two cold coins, blade already drawn.

name: owlbear
short_desc: Something that decided to be a bear and an owl both — feathered, beaked, and vast with muscle.

name: giant spider

attacks.name: bite
attacks.effect: on hit, DC 11 CON save or +2d8 poison (half on save)

attacks.name: web
attacks.effect: restrained; DC 12 STR to burst

short_desc: A hunched, horse-sized spider crouched in silk the color of old lace.

name: mummy

attacks.name: rotting fist
attacks.effect: plus 3d6 necrotic; DC 12 CON save or cursed with mummy rot (no healing; max HP drops 3d6 per day)

attacks.name: dreadful glare
attacks.effect: DC 11 WIS save or frightened 1 round; fail by 5+ also paralyzed

short_desc: Bandaged, dust-dry, one eye still wet under the wrappings, stepping out of the sarcophagus.

name: cave troll
short_desc: A long-armed thing the color of wet clay, the cuts you already gave it knitting closed as it comes.

name: will-o'-wisp

attacks.name: consume life
attacks.effect: on a dying target, DC 10 CON save or die; wisp heals 3d6

short_desc: A pale blue ember the size of a fist, bobbing just off the path, waiting for you to follow.

name: gelatinous ooze

attacks.name: engulf
attacks.effect: on hit, target engulfed and restrained; takes 6d6 acid at start of ooze's turns

short_desc: A corridor of empty air that is, on closer look, not empty at all — and already closer than it was.

name: bog shambler

attacks.name: slam
attacks.effect: on two-slam hit, Medium or smaller target grappled (escape DC 14) and suffocating

short_desc: What you took for a mound of rotten reeds stands up, shedding brackish water in sheets.

name: stone sentinel

attacks.name: slow
attacks.effect: each target DC 17 WIS save or speed halved, one action OR bonus per turn, no reactions for 1 min

short_desc: A weather-smoothed giant of granite stepping down off the pedestal you thought was a statue.

name: young green dragon

attacks.name: bite
attacks.effect: plus 1d6 poison

attacks.name: poison breath
attacks.effect: 30-foot cone, DC 14 CON save, 12d6 poison (half on save)

short_desc: An emerald-scaled serpent-wyrm the size of a cart, moss caught on its horns, smiling too widely.

name: death knight

attacks.name: longsword
attacks.effect: plus 4d8 necrotic

attacks.name: hellfire orb
attacks.effect: 20-foot radius, DC 18 DEX save, 10d6 fire + 10d6 necrotic (half on save)

short_desc: A crowned figure in black plate, visor empty but for a still red coal, one gauntleted hand on a sword that smokes.

name: eye tyrant

attacks.name: eye rays
attacks.effect: three random rays (of ten) each turn at one target within 120 ft: charm, paralyze, fear, slow, wound, disintegrate, petrify, sleep, telekinesis, enervation; each forces its own save

attacks.name: antimagic cone
attacks.effect: central eye projects a 150-ft cone that suppresses spells and magical effects wholly within it

short_desc: A great pale sphere that is mostly one unblinking eye, with ten smaller eyes waving on stalks, all of them finding you at once.
